Saves engine spend + latency + context (agent gets the same summary/ref without re-paying). Configurable TTL (default 24h).

Title: harness.retrieve(dispatch_id scope='full'|'summary'|'chunks') for on-demand
Notes: Wave 11-B paired with W11-CONTEXT-FRUGAL-RETURN. After dispatch returns a ref, agent calls retrieve() only when needed. scope='chunks' yields N-token-sized segments for RAG-style retrieval of large dispatches without ingesting all at once. Storage: flat files under .harness/dispatched/<dispatch_id>.txt + .summary indexed by JSONL manifest.

Title: budget_status() returns offload_ratio + remaining_budget + per-engine counts
Notes: Wave 11-C. Per panel C4: agent needs to KNOW its offload is working. budget_status() returns dict: {session_tokens_total, session_cost_total, offload_ratio (harness/total), remaining_budget_usd (if set), dispatches_fired, engines_used: {kimi: N, deepseek: M, ...}, avg_cost_per_token}. Subsumes the deferred W11-COST-VISIBILITY-WIDGET for agents.

Title: cron alternative to Windows Task Scheduler for observer
Notes: Wave 11-C. Per panel A4: Windows Task Scheduler dependency breaks the harness for any Mac/Linux agent. Add cron-based observer arming with same cycle semantics. Detection: harness observer arm picks cron OR Task Scheduler based on platform. Tests verify both paths via mock subprocess.

Title: adapter validate --json for agent auto-correction loops
Notes: --json flag added to harness adapter validate. _validate_exc_to_json_errors() converts Pydantic ValidationError + yaml.YAMLError + FileNotFoundError + generic Exception into structured {project, status, errors[]} payload. Each error has {field, line, severity, message, suggested_fix}. Pretty output preserved when --json not passed. Exit 0 for valid, 1 for errors. 10 new tests in tests/test_adapter_validate_json.py cover: helper paths (file-not-found, YAML error, Pydantic ValidationError, generic Exception), CLI integration (valid ok status, missing-file structured error, ValueError structured error, pretty path unchanged, error pretty path unchanged, JSON always parseable).
